questions.target_text: I had my hair cut yesterday.
questions.question: Мені підстригли волосся вчора.

questions.target_text: She had her car repaired last week.

questions.target_text: We had our house painted in June.
questions.question: Нам пофарбували будинок у червні.

questions.target_text: He had his phone fixed at the shop.
questions.question: Йому полагодили телефон у майстерні.

questions.target_text: They had their passports renewed.
questions.question: Їм оновили паспорти.

questions.target_text: She had her dress cleaned before the party.

questions.target_text: We had the windows washed.
questions.question: Нам помили вікна.

questions.source_text_uk: Я домігся, щоб мій ноутбук швидко відремонтували.

questions.target_text: We will have the roof repaired next month.
